# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
Compare document-authority clarification with decision rationale recording and choose the clearer fit for a docs overlap problem.

## Expected selection
use

## Why
The task is to name the authoritative file and reduce overlap confusion between guidance files.

## Expected object
A source-of-truth decision that names the authoritative file and explains the relationship to overlapping documents.

## Boundary notes
This is a source-of-truth-check case, not an adr-write case.

## Verification hooks
- name the authoritative file
- explain how overlaps are resolved
- avoid turning the task into an ADR
